case.title: UNITED STATES v. BLISS & LAUGHLIN, INC.

opinion.h1: UNITED STATES v. BLISS & LAUGHLIN, INC., 371 U.S. 70 (1962)
opinion.h4: UNITED STATES v. BLISS & LAUGHLIN, INC. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 367. Decided November 5, 1962.
opinion.p: Judgment vacated and case remanded for reconsideration in light of Brown Shoe Co. v. United States, 370 U.S. 294.
Solicitor General Cox, Assistant Attorney General Loevinger and Lionel Kestenbaum for the United States.
W. Donald McSweeney and Maurice Jones, Jr. for appellee.
The judgment is vacated and the case is remanded for reconsideration in light of Brown Shoe Co. v. United States, 370 U.S. 294.
